response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in multiple languages and technologies, including C++ early in his career. However, his recent experience (past 12+ years) is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, with minimal to no recent work in C++ or the specific industrial automation domain. His resume lacks evidence of secure development lifecycle practices, IEC 62443 compliance, or cloud platform solutions for industrial automation as required by the role. The mismatch in recent expertise and role requirements significantly reduces his overall fit.
strengths: Strong background in C++ with early career experience at National Instruments
Demonstrated expertise in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., DLang at Dunnhumby media)
Proven ability to architect scalable systems and mentor teams (e.g., GISCollective, re:cinq)
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ experience (last substantial C++ work ~20 years ago)
No evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards implementation
Lack of domain experience in industrial automation, IoT, or automation machinery manufacturing

key_factors.factor: Recent C++ experience and industrial automation domain expertise
Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
Cloud platform and on-premises solutions for industrial automation
